prompt: Random Forests and decision tree pruning visualized as a transforming landscape in the style of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock prints (Edo period). A wide asymmetrical composition showing a dense forest transitioning into isolated trees, then a single prominent branching tree, and finally into pruned stumps and simplified forms. Flat, unmodulated color areas in muted indigo, green, and ochre. Strong black contour outlines, no gradients or realistic shading. Stylized clouds and simplified natural forms, with visible woodblock print texture. No modern elements, no photorealism, no perspective depth.
concept: Random Forests and decision tree pruning
tradition_approach: Flat color planes, bold contour lines, asymmetrical composition, and stylized natural forms used to encode ensemble trees and pruning as a landscape transformation.
